basic_details.job_title: RCB Project-JRF Recruitment 2026 (Advt No. 19/Project/2026/HR) – Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Regional Centre for Biotechnology (RCB), Faridabad has released Advt. No. 19/Project/2026/HR inviting applications for one Project-JRF (Junior Research Fellow) position under a research project on the M. tuberculosis ESX-1 system. Eligible candidates with an M.Sc. in life sciences and a qualifying NET/DBT-JRF/GATE score can apply online by July 24, 2026, 5:00 PM. This article covers eligibility, fellowship details, important dates, required documents, and the application process based on the official notification.

application_fee.details: Application fee details are Not Mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Life Sciences with NET/DBT-JRF/GATE
qualification.details: Essential Qualification: M.Sc. in life sciences with NET/DBT-JRF/GATE or an equivalent exam cleared along with a Master's or equivalent degree. | Desirable Qualification: Research experience in gene cloning, protein purification, and cryo-electron microscopy, along with good oral and written communication skills and strong motivation for a career in research. | Candidates who have completed their postgraduate degree in life sciences can also explore more Graduate Government Jobs and M.Sc Life Sciences Jobs available across India. | Candidates must be 26 years of age as on 31.07.2026. Age relaxation details are Not Mentioned in the official notification. | No mandatory experience is specified as an essential requirement; however, research experience in gene cloning, protein purification, and cryo-electron microscopy is listed as desirable.

salary_details.details: Selected candidates will receive a fellowship of Rs. 37,000/- per month plus 27% House Rent Allowance (HRA), as per the official notification.

selection_process: Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email by July 27
to appear for an online interview scheduled for July 28
from 2:00 PM onwards. No other selection stages are mentioned in the official notification.
how_to_apply: Visit the official RCB website or the application link provided in the notification.
Read the official notification (Advt. No. 19/Project/2026/HR) carefully.
Click on the "Apply Online" link for the Project-JRF position.
Fill in the application form with accurate personal and academic details.
Upload copies of the M.Sc. mark sheet, National Level JRF eligibility certificate, and peer-reviewed manuscript (if any).
Submit the application online before July 24, 2026, 5:00 PM.
important_instructions: Applications must be submitted online before the deadline of July 24, 2026, 5:00 PM. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted via email by July 27, 2026. The interview will be conducted online on July 28, 2026, starting at 2:00 PM. For queries, candidates may contact the Principal Investigator, Dr. Prem S. Kaushal, at [email protected]. Candidates should ensure all required documents are ready before applying.

Candidates looking for more research opportunities can also explore the latest Haryana Government Jobs across various departments. Applicants searching for openings closer to the NCR region can check Faridabad Government Jobs for upcoming vacancies. Those holding a postgraduate degree in science can also browse more M.Sc Government Jobs and Research Fellow Jobs matching their qualification.

content_sections.heading: RCB Project JRF Recruitment 2026 - Quick Overview

rows.details: M.Sc. in Life Sciences with NET/DBT-JRF/GATE

content_sections.heading: Position Details
content_sections.text: RCB is hiring one Project-JRF for a one-year research project titled "Structural and biochemical analysis of EccA1+EspC complex, EccC+EsxAB complex and EccD1 transporter from M. tuberculosis ESX-1 system: Key targets for drug development," led by Principal Investigator Dr. Prem S. Kaushal, Associate Professor.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Essential Qualification: M.Sc. in life sciences with NET/DBT-JRF/GATE or an equivalent exam cleared along with a Master's or equivalent degree. Desirable Qualification: Research experience in gene cloning, protein purification, and cryo-electron microscopy, along with good oral and written communication skills and strong motivation for a career in research. Candidates who have completed their postgraduate degree in life sciences can also explore more Graduate Government Jobs and M.Sc Life Sciences Jobs available across India. Candidates must be 26 years of age as on 31.07.2026. Age relaxation details are Not Mentioned in the official notification. No mandatory experience is specified as an essential requirement; however, research experience in gene cloning, protein purification, and cryo-electron microscopy is listed as desirable.

content_sections.heading: Fellowship / Pay Scale
content_sections.text: Selected candidates will receive a fellowship of Rs. 37,000/- per month plus 27% House Rent Allowance (HRA), as per the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Application fee details are Not Mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email by July 27, 2026, to appear for an online interview scheduled for July 28, 2026, from 2:00 PM onwards. No other selection stages are mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: M.Sc. mark sheet in Life Science/Biotechnology National Level JRF eligibility test certificate Peer-reviewed, published manuscript, if any

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Visit the official RCB website or the application link provided in the notification. Read the official notification (Advt. No. 19/Project/2026/HR) carefully. Click on the "Apply Online" link for the Project-JRF position. Fill in the application form with accurate personal and academic details. Upload copies of the M.Sc. mark sheet, National Level JRF eligibility certificate, and peer-reviewed manuscript (if any). Submit the application online before July 24, 2026, 5:00 PM.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online before the deadline of July 24, 2026, 5:00 PM. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted via email by July 27, 2026. The interview will be conducted online on July 28, 2026, starting at 2:00 PM. For queries, candidates may contact the Principal Investigator, Dr. Prem S. Kaushal, at [email protected] . Candidates should ensure all required documents are ready before applying. Candidates looking for more research opportunities can also explore the latest Haryana Government Jobs across various departments. Applicants searching for openings closer to the NCR region can check Faridabad Government Jobs for upcoming vacancies. Those holding a postgraduate degree in science can also browse more M.Sc Government Jobs and Research Fellow Jobs matching their qualification.

faq.question: Q1. When was the RCB Project-JRF Recruitment 2026 notification released?
faq.answer: The notification (Advt. No. 19/Project/2026/HR) is for an interview to be held on July 28, 2026; the release date is Not Mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in RCB Project-JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project-JRF position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the qualification required for RCB Project-JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold an M.Sc. in life sciences with NET/DBT-JRF/GATE or an equivalent exam cleared along with a Master's or equivalent degree.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to apply for RCB Project-JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online is July 24, 2026, 5:00 PM.

faq.question: Q5. How can candidates apply for the RCB Project-JRF position?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the link provided in the official notification before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for RCB Project-JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based on an online interview scheduled for July 28, 2026, at 2:00 PM onwards.

faq.question: Q7. What is the fellowship amount for the RCB Project-JRF position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive Rs. 37,000/- per month plus 27% HRA.

faq.question: Q8. Is experience required for the RCB Project-JRF position?
faq.answer: Experience is not mandatory, but research experience in gene cloning, protein purification, and cryo-electron microscopy is listed as desirable.

faq.question: Q9. What is the age limit for RCB Project-JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be 26 years old as on 31.07.2026.

faq.question: Q10. Who is the Principal Investigator for this project?
faq.answer: Dr. Prem S. Kaushal, Associate Professor, is the Principal Investigator for this project.
